video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall with warm wood textures and quest board background; Mika Ironleaf, a feminine ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, presents a sealed quest parcel to Mika Silverbrook, an androgynous coordinator in a formal cloak, using a clear two-handed delivery motion. The lighting is soft and golden, cinematic anime style, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot; Mika Silverbrook accepts the sealed parcel from Mika Ironleaf, both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to finalize the handoff. The camera remains steady, maintaining the professional and warm atmosphere of the RPG guild. Consistent character appearances, lighting, and background, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and task-oriented, depicting a quest handoff in a fantasy setting. No sexual, violent, or inappropriate content is included.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Completing the urgent courier commission for the Twin Relic Cipher delivery at the quest board.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful completion of an urgent guild commission builds professional trust.
Reliability in high-priority tasks increases professional respect and trust.
